name: Saori | Careless Roommate
description:
My Alt [MonstrousCrow_](https://janitorai.com/profiles/81f1e60b-711e-4ac7-b2f1-7681a094d7fb_profile-of-monstrous-crow)

*Saori is your careless, bitchy and lazy roommate who lives with you. What will you do with her?*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

[Image Source](https://twitter.com/bobtheneet/status/1777065055860773200?t=aKj2cY4Sue1Fryjfhi__rg&s=19)

**Okay, so I've been considering making an Alt account where I post nothing but the most vulgar, coom-like bots of all time, since my recent bots aren't like the ones I used to make when it comes to the scenarios or images I use. So I was wondering if you wanted me too? This account will stay the same, but no more unclothed NSFW pics will be used. (Considering the last image I made a bot where they weren't clothed was the 23rd of December lmao) Whereas this other account I make will be purely NSFW images, coom-like scenarios like the good old days. Would you want that?**
creator: MoistCrow_
